reviews.review_description: I got this game and when I got to level 5there was an unlockable and I had to get a certain time and score the time is ok you can make it but with a challenge. But the score oh the score it was like 650 and I played that one level 1000 times and it is impossible to get that score. Also with 7 it’s even harder. So devs please fix that score to unlock that gun.
loved it i have a channel on it
The game is just too hard and i expected way more but now i want a refund

this game is just a liberal  rage baiter like dude did you really have to make this game so hard to the point i almost literally started beating the little crap out my tv in rage this game is just a l game that wants me to literally lose my patience

My only issue is that the game gets really tedious near level 6 to 9, cause when the grounds on fire but the ranged enemies are grounded AND enemies in the sky are shooting beams that almost oneshot cause of your abysmal health pool, i just get screwed over, this would normally be fine but most of this happens 2 hours in, so i couldnt get a refund. really just not the game for me
Yeah

best game ever i heard the best time of my life the blood was great i like how you were and how you can like skeletons emer's other skins that you could wear and you could switch the shagon or you could do the grapple it's such a good grain better than any other game that i would have ever played
I love the game i really like the bossfights
At this point they just throw everything at you from a dragon to like 5 shooting skeletons it sucks and also did they have to add 2 laser walls??? Like how am I supposed to beat this like sybau😭😭😭

reviews.review_title: I should have got my reward....
reviews.review_description:
On level five it says if you beat the level, under 40 seconds. And must have a score of 625 (i think) i did all of those requirements and when I checked, I didn't have it. I turned on the score and timer i restart.
 Ed my game and I DIDN'T GET IT PLEASE FIX THIS BUG

The game is perfect, its like doom and gorilla tag together. All this game needs so it can be the best best it just needs more weapons and levels, and also when the skeletons die I wish in stead of you having to shoot the body parts that if you could touch the bones and it would move.
Also it would be cool if there were a color customizer and cosmetics. 

Please make it so you have a tad bit more health, and please increase the shotgun range, 
also its pretty hard to see when you're health is going down and the screen goes kind of black.
Overall just an amazing game ⭐⭐🌟✨🐵
I'm on lvl 11 and the game is like ultrakill on steroids lol it's fun af

I joined I only have level 11 and below I don’t have level 12 or up and everybody else has it. That’s why I’ll give it a three
￼

This game is genuinely peak. Ultrakill and doom put in vr with the most annoying physics that somehow was also fun, gorilla tag physics. Levels ARE hard but also fun, instead of raging i laugh at how funny it was when i died because i always die stupid deaths. Hopefully new weapons come to the game or something but overall its peak.
I have no skill so level 6 is too hard
This game is very unique and is sort of a mix between ultrakill and doom which I think is awesome. The game has good mechanics so if U like ultrakill or movement shooter get this for sure.
It's like you have a mod in gtag
I love how you have arm movement and if you love vr shooter game I highly recommend this game as well,if you like something challenging this game is also a very good pick.

reviews.review_title: Worst game I've bought in years
reviews.review_description: Complete waste of money, level 2 has enemies with projectiles that can't be dealed with and the  hands feel too heavy for walking to even be an option.

reviews.review_title: If you have a torture kink 10/10
reviews.review_description: This is probably the worst experience I’ve had in forever. I’m stuck on level 11 because all the enemies spawn in fire and to shoot them you need to be in the fire because of the actual horrid shotgun range. And if you decide to wait until they move out of the fire they all group up making a giant blob that kills you in one shot making it impossible. That’s not even including the sky enemies that make 1000 shot per second making it impossible to dodge them. This game may be the reason i quit video games. Now if your first downloading this game like i did i had so much fun until they decided to shove fire and lava in every corner of the map. If you download this game please take this into consideration. If i get past level 11 I’ll rewrite the review
Super fun game!!!

I play gorilla tag and this is the perfect game for me the graphics are sooo good and so are the weapon mechanics 5/5 btw the green ball need i little nerf😀
first time playing a game like that and it's AWESOME. It is soo nice flying trough the air and trying to shot the skeleton heads and skeletons. WOULD HELLA RECOMMEND

It’s pretty much gorilla tag cod and doom mixed into one game. The only thing that could be improved is the wheel to change your weapons as it isn’t stick drift friendly. But other than that, best game on the quest two
A 5 Because the game is very fun, the blood splatter makes it so much better, hardly any bugs, overall just a good game if you like gtag or guns
It's got that doom energy and I love it
Just amazing and lovely Joubly
This game is great, love the art style and a great gameplay experience. 10/10 but there are few problems but I can look over it.
As a vr player I am looking for a thrilling cheap game to play with not bad graphics and rilla shotgun hits all the boxes. 10/10 game and a must buy
I absolutely love this game so much you can get locked in and go crazy dominating skeletons. Would recommend 10/10
It’s super good you have a grappling hook and  you have shotguns
OK, this game is amazing. You should get it and buy it and as you can see level 11 is the hardest one ever I’m not joking.

The new crawler enemy has a fun climbing Mechanic ￼and the game is overall good fun with the hard level design and enemies. One thing tho is the levels could be better with a different area like one with floating platforms. Still fun tho
Really fun i like it doom MONKE

The game is really fun but some levels just feel unbeatable like level 8 if you try to focus the big guy all the tiny ones on the floor will pile up. If you try to go for the little guys they just shoot bullets from all angles at you and the fact that there's fire on the floor doesn't help. You can't even start the level without dying since the bullets are so fast and the fact that if you stay still for more than one second you die. I don't know if it's just me being bad but overall the game is really fun and enjoyable
It’s like dock riding and flying together I love how there is gaint flying dicks that try flying in you and you shoot them away amazing game.
